title: Trade funding tooltip stays above adjacent panels

steps.expression: (() => { const trigger = document.querySelector("[data-role='active-asset-funding-trigger']"); if (!trigger) { return { clicked: false, reason: "missing-trigger" }; } trigger.click(); return { clicked: true, ariaExpanded: trigger.getAttribute("aria-expanded") }; })()

(() => { const panel = document.querySelector("[data-role='active-asset-funding-tooltip']"); const orderbook = document.querySelector("[data-parity-id='trade-orderbook-panel']"); const account = document.querySelector("[data-parity-id='trade-account-tables-panel']"); const trigger = document.querySelector("[data-role='active-asset-funding-trigger']"); if (!panel || !orderbook || !account || !trigger) { return { panelPresent: Boolean(panel), orderbookPresent: Boolean(orderbook), accountPresent: Boolean(account), triggerPresent: Boolean(trigger) }; } const rect = (node) => { const box = node.getBoundingClientRect(); return { left: box.left, top: box.top, right: box.right, bottom: box.bottom, width: box.width, height: box.height }; }; const overlaps = (left, right) => left.left < right.right && left.right > right.left && left.top < right.bottom && left.bottom > right.top; const panelRect = rect(panel); const orderbookRect = rect(orderbook); const accountRect = rect(account); const samplePoint = (x, y) => { const element = document.elementFromPoint(x, y); return { x, y, withinViewport: x >= 0 && y >= 0 && x <= window.innerWidth && y <= window.innerHeight, topDataRole: element?.closest("[data-role]")?.getAttribute("data-role") || null, insidePanel: Boolean(element && panel.contains(element)) }; }; const clamp = (value, lower, upper) => Math.max(lower, Math.min(upper, value)); const centerSample = samplePoint(clamp(panelRect.left + panelRect.width / 2, 1, window.innerWidth - 1), clamp(panelRect.top + panelRect.height / 2, 1, window.innerHeight - 1)); const rightOverlap = overlaps(panelRect, orderbookRect); const bottomOverlap = overlaps(panelRect, accountRect); const rightSample = rightOverlap ? samplePoint(clamp(Math.max(orderbookRect.left + 8, panelRect.left + 8), 1, window.innerWidth - 1), clamp(panelRect.top + Math.min(panelRect.height / 2, 24), 1, window.innerHeight - 1)) : null; const bottomSample = bottomOverlap ? samplePoint(clamp(panelRect.left + Math.min(panelRect.width / 2, 24), 1, window.innerWidth - 1), clamp(Math.max(accountRect.top + 8, panelRect.top + 8), 1, window.innerHeight - 1)) : null; return { panelPresent: true, triggerPressed: trigger.getAttribute("aria-pressed"), panelRect, orderbookRect, accountRect, centerSample, rightOverlap, rightSample, bottomOverlap, bottomSample }; })()
